name: Beef Stew #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef with the onions in a large pot.
2. Once the meat is brown, add 3 cups of water and bay leaves.
3. Heat over medium heat while you peel the potatoes and carrots.
4. Add the peeled potatoes and carrots to the stew pot.
5. Cover with water.
6. Bring to a boil.
7. Cook until the potatoes are tender.
8. Mix up a flour and water mixture to thicken the stew.
9. Add it right to the pot.
10. Stir well to ensure there are no lumps.
11. Add pepper, salt, and other spices you like (including garlic and oregano if desired).
12. Once the stew is thickened, serve it. Sometimes dumplings are added; a common recipe uses Bisquick.
